title: Running Claude Code on Amazon Bedrock
summary: AWS Developers walkthrough on running Claude Code, Anthropic's agentic coding tool, on Amazon Bedrock. Covers environment setup, cross-region inference, prompt caching, the Bedrock Mantle endpoint, cost tracking, and guardrails for compliance and data residency requirements.
writeup: This AWS Developers walkthrough demonstrates running Claude Code, Anthropic's agentic coding tool, on Amazon Bedrock. It covers environment setup, cross-region inference, prompt caching, and the Bedrock Mantle endpoint. The video matters for teams that need to keep agentic coding workflows within Bedrock for compliance and data residency requirements, and it addresses cost tracking and guardrails as part of that configuration.
